clupp.description: Development of scalable product-oriented web solutions, focused on dynamic interfaces, backend APIs and solid engineering practices.
responsibilities: Built scalable web solutions with Next.js, React.js, Node.js and Firebase.
Implemented dynamic, responsive and intuitive product-focused interfaces.
Developed and integrated backend APIs and services for product capabilities.
Implemented authentication, data management and service integrations with Firebase.
Applied frontend and backend engineering best practices in a modern stack environment.

diferente-web.description: API development and maintenance, external service integrations, e-commerce solutions and database management across full stack projects.
responsibilities: Built and maintained APIs to integrate external services and improve system communication.
Integrated and customized e-commerce solutions with BigCommerce.
Managed MySQL and MongoDB data models with focus on scalability, security and performance.
Contributed to full stack projects across backend, frontend and third-party integrations.

hoteles-buenaventura.description: Built an interactive calendar for date, booking and availability management, including REST API construction and a React.js frontend.
responsibilities: Built an interactive calendar for date, booking and availability management.
Developed REST APIs with Laravel and MySQL for operational data management.
Implemented React.js frontend features for interactive date visualization and selection.
Integrated frontend and backend to improve end-user experience.

the-rocket-code.description: Developed web features, migrated frontend systems and built APIs for efficient client-server communication.
responsibilities: Developed application features using React.js.
Migrated a pricing quote tool from Next.js to React.js, improving structure and maintainability.
Built APIs with Node.js, Express and MongoDB for efficient frontend-backend communication.
Contributed to website and web application development for multiple clients.
related-projects: Web quote builder (Next.js to React.js migration)

creativa-softline.description: Designed and built functional responsive websites. First professional experience in web development and implementation.
responsibilities: Designed and developed functional, responsive and visually engaging websites.
Implemented interfaces with Bootstrap, Skeleton and Boilerplate.
Participated in design, layout and web implementation workflows.
